items.markdown:
HealthyLine's **[InfraMat Pro](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,mid:576462776103924850,imageDocid:16256205561376498091,gpcid:7159217911682700885,headlineOfferDocid:523216759241461117,catalogid:12863582988412340832,productDocid:13145803770623623595,rds:PC_7159217911682700885%7CPROD_PC_7159217911682700885&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwitg4b5oaSTAxUgWUEAHdjbE4MQxa4PegQIAhAC)** PEMF mats are highly regarded for professional spa and clinical environments, specifically the [Platinum Series](https://healthyline.com/products/platinum-series-pemf-photon-gemstone-inframat-pro) and [Jet Series](https://healthyline.com/collections/healthyline-mats) . These models are designed to fit standard massage and chiropractic tables and feature **5-in-1 therapeutic technologies** : PEMF, Far Infrared (FIR) heat, Hot Stone, Negative Ion, and Photon Light therapy.[[1]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/products-healthyline-jet-mattfull-7224-infra-mat-pro-872-0052/)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13145803770623623595,catalogid:12863582988412340832,gpcid:7159217911682700885,mid:576462776103924850&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://livelovespa.com/products/platinum-mat%E2%84%A2-full-7224-firm-photon-advanced-pemf-inframat-pro%C2%AE-healthyline#:~:text=Quality%20and%20Value:%20Access%20professional,to%20sleep%20on%20the%20mat)[[4]](https://www.rehabmart.com/product/holistic-platinum-mats-49242.html#:~:text=The%20InfraMat%20Pro%20by%20Platinum-Mat%20Firm%20is,hot%20stone%20-%20into%20one%20strong%20device.)[[5]](https://www.instagram.com/p/DS3cRc0DVzD/#:~:text=HealthyLine%20blends%20natural%20healing%20therapy%20with%20innovative,off%20your%20order%20-%20Link%20in%20bio!)

Recommended Professional Models

Professionals typically choose between these three high-performance series based on the level of PEMF customization required:[[1]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/products-healthyline-jet-mattfull-7224-infra-mat-pro-872-0052/)

- **Platinum Series (Most Advanced)**:
	- **Features** : Includes a fully customizable PEMF system where you can program the frequency (1−3 0 H z ), waveform (sine or square), pulse duration, and intensity.
	- **Ideal for** : Spas wanting to offer bespoke wellness sessions tailored to specific client goals like "Relax" (Delta waves) or "Recover" (Beta waves).
	- **Key Model**: [Platinum Mat Full Pro PLUS 7428](https://www.thewarmingstore.com/healthyline-inframat-pro-platinum-mat-full-pro-plus-7428-firm-photon-advanced-pemf.html) (~$979 – $2,500).
- **Jet Series (Optimized for Recovery)**:
	- **Features** : Offers professional-grade PEMF with a max intensity of up to 8 G a u s s and a frequency range of 0.2 5−3 0 H z.
	- **Ideal for** : High-traffic wellness centers focusing on physical recovery and circulatory support.
	- **Key Model**: [Jet Mat Full 7224](https://medicalspasupply.com/products/healthyline-jet-mat-7224-photon-pemf-inframat-pro%C2%AE) (~$1,149 – $1,499).
- **TAJ Series (Luxury Best-Seller)**:
	- **Features** : A firm, full-sized mat using a fixed PEMF frequency of 7.8 H z (mimicking the Earth's natural resonance).
	- **Ideal for** : General relaxation and luxury spa treatments where ease of use is a priority.
	- **Key Model**: [TAJ-Mat Full 7224 Firm](https://livelovespa.com/products/taj-mat%E2%84%A2-full-7224-firm-photon-pemf-inframat-pro%C2%AE-healthyline) (~$850 – $1,049).[[1]](https://healthyline.com/#:~:text=Inspired%20by%20Nature%2C%20Powered%20by,Boost%20Recovery)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6305978356464384067,catalogid:17597288903743001611,gpcid:18106517630577363774&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.thewarmingstore.com/healthyline-inframat-pro-platinum-mat-full-pro-plus-7428-firm-photon-advanced-pemf.html#:~:text=Features:,of%20local%20circulation%20where%20applied)[[4]](https://healthyline.com/products/platinum-series-pemf-photon-gemstone-inframat-pro#:~:text=Add%20to%20cart-,Ease%20Muscle%20Tension,PEMF%20across%20the%20entire%20body.)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6305978356464384067,catalogid:17597288903743001611,gpcid:18106517630577363774&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6305978356464384067,catalogid:17597288903743001611,gpcid:18106517630577363774&ibp=oshop)[[7]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8131024054624857736,catalogid:4882022416741348740,gpcid:14644273264679983687,mid:576462869039087432&ibp=oshop)[[8]](https://medicalspasupply.com/products/healthyline-jet-mat-7224-photon-pemf-inframat-pro%C2%AE#:~:text=The%20Jet%20Mat%207224%20is,a%20relaxing%20evening%20at%20home.)[[9]](https://healthyline.com/pages/pemf-infrared-mats-for-spas#:~:text=PEMF%20%28Pulsed%20Electromagnetic%20Field%29%20Therapy,the%20body's%20natural%20energy%20fields.)[[10]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/products-healthyline-jet-mattfull-7224-infra-mat-pro-872-0052/)[[11]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13145803770623623595,catalogid:12863582988412340832,gpcid:7159217911682700885,mid:576462776103924850&ibp=oshop)[[12]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13145803770623623595,catalogid:12863582988412340832,gpcid:7159217911682700885,mid:576462776103924850&ibp=oshop)[[13]](https://livelovespa.com/products/taj-mat%E2%84%A2-full-7224-firm-photon-pemf-inframat-pro%C2%AE-healthyline#:~:text=Terms%20&%20Conditions-,Home,the%20line%205%20Therapy%20experience)[[14]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13145803770623623595,catalogid:12863582988412340832,gpcid:7159217911682700885,mid:576462776103924850&ibp=oshop)

Spa Professional Benefits

- **Revenue Generation** : Spas can charge premium rates for PEMF sessions, bundle them into massage packages, or offer them as stand-alone "recovery station" treatments.
- **Enhanced Service Efficacy** : Using the mat during a massage relaxes the client’s muscles and makes the body more receptive to manual work.
- **Durability** : Professional models feature up to **21 functional layers** , including advanced EMF shielding, non-toxic medical-grade materials, and durable heat-resistant mesh.
- **Warranty** : HealthyLine provides a **5-year extended warranty** and a lifetime trade-in/upgrade policy, protecting the business investment.[[1]](https://healthyline.com/#:~:text=Inspired%20by%20Nature%2C%20Powered%20by,Boost%20Recovery)[[2]](https://healthyline.com/pages/pemf-infrared-mats-for-spas#:~:text=PEMF%20%28Pulsed%20Electromagnetic%20Field%29%20Therapy,the%20body's%20natural%20energy%20fields.)[[3]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/products-healthyline-jet-mattfull-7224-infra-mat-pro-872-0052/)[[4]](https://www.thewarmingstore.com/healthyline-inframat-pro-platinum-mat-full-pro-plus-7428-firm-photon-advanced-pemf.html#:~:text=Features:,of%20local%20circulation%20where%20applied)[[5]](https://www.amazon.com/HealthyLine-Platinum-Mat-Revolutionary-Arthritis/dp/B087YTWG5Q#:~:text=high%20tech%20controller.-,NATURALLY%20RELIEVE%20PAIN:%20This%20inframat%20pro%20heating%20pad%20will%20provide,sauna%20foil%20blanket%20and%20manual.)[[6]](https://medicalspasupply.com/products/healthyline-jet-mat-7224-photon-pemf-inframat-pro%C2%AE#:~:text=The%20Jet%20Mat%207224%20is,a%20relaxing%20evening%20at%20home.)[[7]](https://healthyline.com/#:~:text=FIND%20YOUR%20PERFECT%20HEATED%20GEMSTONE,Science-Backed%20Technologies)

items.title: Spa Professional Benefits
items.text: Revenue Generation : Spas can charge premium rates for PEMF sessions, bundle them into massage packages, or offer them as stand-alone "recovery station" treatments. Enhanced Service Efficacy : Using the mat during a massage relaxes the client’s muscles and makes the body more receptive to manual work. Durability : Professional models feature up to 21 functional layers, including advanced EMF shielding, non-toxic medical-grade materials, and durable heat-resistant mesh. Warranty : HealthyLine provides a 5-year extended warranty and a lifetime trade-in/upgrade policy, protecting the business investment.
items.markdown:
- **Revenue Generation** : Spas can charge premium rates for PEMF sessions, bundle them into massage packages, or offer them as stand-alone "recovery station" treatments.
- **Enhanced Service Efficacy** : Using the mat during a massage relaxes the client’s muscles and makes the body more receptive to manual work.
- **Durability** : Professional models feature up to **21 functional layers** , including advanced EMF shielding, non-toxic medical-grade materials, and durable heat-resistant mesh.
- **Warranty** : HealthyLine provides a **5-year extended warranty** and a lifetime trade-in/upgrade policy, protecting the business investment.[[1]](https://healthyline.com/#:~:text=Inspired%20by%20Nature%2C%20Powered%20by,Boost%20Recovery)[[2]](https://healthyline.com/pages/pemf-infrared-mats-for-spas#:~:text=PEMF%20%28Pulsed%20Electromagnetic%20Field%29%20Therapy,the%20body's%20natural%20energy%20fields.)[[3]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/products-healthyline-jet-mattfull-7224-infra-mat-pro-872-0052/)[[4]](https://www.thewarmingstore.com/healthyline-inframat-pro-platinum-mat-full-pro-plus-7428-firm-photon-advanced-pemf.html#:~:text=Features:,of%20local%20circulation%20where%20applied)[[5]](https://www.amazon.com/HealthyLine-Platinum-Mat-Revolutionary-Arthritis/dp/B087YTWG5Q#:~:text=high%20tech%20controller.-,NATURALLY%20RELIEVE%20PAIN:%20This%20inframat%20pro%20heating%20pad%20will%20provide,sauna%20foil%20blanket%20and%20manual.)[[6]](https://medicalspasupply.com/products/healthyline-jet-mat-7224-photon-pemf-inframat-pro%C2%AE#:~:text=The%20Jet%20Mat%207224%20is,a%20relaxing%20evening%20at%20home.)[[7]](https://healthyline.com/#:~:text=FIND%20YOUR%20PERFECT%20HEATED%20GEMSTONE,Science-Backed%20Technologies)
